tech: C#.NET, Serial Port Integration, ERP Automation, RS232 Protocol, CSV Data Engine
title: Aluminum Bundle Weight Checker V3.0
description: Designed and developed a console-based high-precision automation suite for industrial aluminum production. This system acts as a real-time data bridge between physical Yaohua XK3190-D# Indicators and LightHouse ERP. The solution replaces manual weight entry with a sub-second automated polling mechanism that identifies stable weights and validates them against a database of 1,500+ master die charts, triggering label printing in milliseconds.

images.title: Bundle Weight Checker V4
images.desc: Main interface showing real-time weight capture from YAOHUA scale and automated ERP bundle label printing.

images.title: Weight Checker V4.4 Update
images.desc: Enhanced UI with serial port monitoring panel, weight history log, and manual override controls.

images.title: YAOHUA Scale Hardware
